name: Texas Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Texas Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop located in Hutto, TX offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/precious metal purchasing services with convenient hours and accessible facilities.
description_long:
Texas Pawn & Jewelry operates as a pawn shop located at 102 US-79 in Hutto, Texas. The business is part of the FirstCash network, a established brand in the pawn and financial services industry. Operating under the pawn-shops category, the company provides traditional pawn shop services to the Hutto community and surrounding areas.

The company offers collateral-based lending, allowing customers to secure loans against personal items such as jewelry, electronics, and other valuables. They also engage in the buying and selling of gold, jewelry, and other precious items. Their website indicates they operate a physical retail location with standard pawn shop operations including item appraisal, lending, and resale of merchandise.

Texas Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through its association with the FirstCash brand, which provides operational consistency and customer trust. The location offers customer amenities including air conditioning, wheelchair accessibility, dedicated customer parking, and credit card acceptance—features not universally available at all pawn shops. Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday, 9 AM–6 PM Saturday) provide accessibility for working customers.

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers needing quick collateral-based loans without credit checks, as well as those looking to sell jewelry or precious metals. However, pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans and require surrender of personal items as collateral. Customers should understand the redemption timeline and terms before pledging items.
pros: Extended weekday operating hours (9 AM–7 PM) accommodate working customers
Wheelchair accessible facility with dedicated customer parking
Accepts credit cards for added payment flexibility
Associated with FirstCash brand providing operational credibility
No credit check required for collateral-based loans
Local Hutto location with direct phone contact available
cons: Pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans
Requires surrender of personal items as collateral, creating loss risk
Limited information on specific loan terms, redemption periods, or interest rates provided on available listing
No transparent pricing or fee structure disclosed online
Collateral-based model means customers must own valuable items to qualify
best_for: Customers needing quick short-term cash without credit checks
Those with valuable jewelry or items they temporarily need to pledge for liquidity
Individuals looking to sell gold, jewelry, or precious metals for immediate cash
diagnosis: Texas Pawn & Jewelry is best for customers needing immediate short-term collateral-based loans without credit qualification or those seeking to sell jewelry and precious metals quickly. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional lending, and customers risk permanent loss of pledged items if unable to redeem within the specified timeframe.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans against personal items
